name: Project 1
description: This is a detailed description of Project 1. It involved creating a cohesive brand identity, from the logo to the social media assets. The primary tools used were Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop.

name: Project 2
description: Project 2 was a video editing task for a promotional campaign. I used Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects to cut, color grade, and add motion graphics to the final video.
